description: Focused debug suite for THR2 boundary behavior, Hermitian-pair consistency, and bin-level CSV inspection.

vector_selection.name: near_threshold_multitone_Ns1024_thr64
vector_selection.rationale: Short run with bin_stats for fast threshold debugging.

vector_selection.name: near_threshold_multitone_Ns4096_thr4096
vector_selection.rationale: Longer run with bin_stats for release-quality threshold inspection.

vector_selection.name: short_impulse_Ns17_thr0
vector_selection.rationale: Tiny full-tail vector to isolate frame/tail accounting while bin_stats is enabled.

notes: Use this suite when frame_stats or bin_stats mismatch. It is intentionally more verbose than smoke.
